name: io.github.praveensehgal/remarkable
title: reMarkable MCP Server (Read/Write)
description: Read, write, and manage your reMarkable tablet — browse, upload, create folders, move, delete, OCR

environmentVariables.name: REMARKABLE_SSH_HOST
environmentVariables.description: reMarkable tablet IP address (WiFi or USB)

environmentVariables.name: REMARKABLE_SSH_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SSH password shown in tablet Settings > General > Help
